ham.subject: Transaction Alert: INR 12,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a debit of INR 12,000 from your savings account on 07-04-2026 at 14:32 UTC. Agar aapne is transaction ko authorize nahi kiya hai, to turant support se sampark karein.

Thank you,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Important: Your Microsoft 365 Password is Expiring Soon
